author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو بكر محمد بن إبراهيم بن علي بن عاصم بن زاذان الأصبهاني الخازن
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and narrator from Isfahan, known for his extensive travels and collections of hadith.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A collection of hadith narrations by Ibn al-Muqri, reflecting his role as a compiler and transmitter of prophetic traditions.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Part of the broader tradition of hadith compilation in the Islamic intellectual heritage, contributing to the preservation and dissemination of prophetic sayings and actions.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Muhammad Ziyad Umar Taklah is a known hadith scholar and editor with several critical editions of classical hadith works.
